response.original_title: How do I get my money back from SafePal?{money Back}

The ⭐⭐ 1-[870].768.0250 first step is ensuring you have converted your crypto into cash. You⭐ 1-[870].768.0250 must sell your Bitcoin or other assets for USD or your local currency. Once ⭐ 1-[870].768.0250 the trade is complete, the cash will sit in your SafePalbalance. From ⭐⭐ 1-[870].768.0250 there, you can move it to your personal bank account easily. Linking⭐⭐ 1-[870].768.0250 Your Bank Account SafePalrequires ⭐⭐ 1-[870].768.0250 a verified bank account before you can initiate any cash withdrawal. Navigate ⭐⭐ 1-[870].768.0250 to the "Payment Methods" section in your account settings to link one.
